$comment: Defines a single NDJSON event line from events.ndjson. Validates one line at a time — the NDJSON file-level concerns (line splitting, truncated final line tolerance for crash recovery) are handled by the validator, not this schema. Optional fields are listed globally rather than per-event-type (no if/then/else) because the orchestrator controls which fields are emitted per event type; conditional schemas would add complexity without catching real bugs since these files are never hand-edited.
